title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 25.
content:
There was an Old Man of Columbia,
    Who was thirsty, and called out for some beer;
    But they brought it quite hot,
    In a small copper pot,
    Which disgusted that man of Columbia.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 25.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
